title: EnergyResourceNetwork
description: Typed schema for grid-network infrastructure energy resources acting as topology anchors (distribution transformer, busbar, feeder, microgrid). CIM: DT → cim:PowerTransformer, BUS → cim:BusbarSection, FEEDER → cim:Feeder (EquipmentContainer), MICROGRID → cim:Substation (IEC 61970-301).

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. CIM: DT → PowerTransformer, BUS → BusbarSection, FEEDER → Feeder, MICROGRID → Substation/microgrid container (IEC 61970-301).

subResources.description: Child resources anchored to this network element (meters, DTs, buses, feeders). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent network elements (e.g. the substation or feeder this DT belongs to).

GeoJSONPoint.description: GeoJSON Point geometry (RFC 7946). Coordinates are [longitude, latitude].

EnergyResourceNetworkAttributes.description: Attributes for grid-network infrastructure resources. Includes common fields (make, model, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, gps) plus network-specific fields (nominalVoltageKv, zone, substationId, feederCode).

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power capacity, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP.

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this network element was commissioned.

gps.description: GeoJSON Point location of this asset. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] per RFC 7946.

nominalVoltageKv.description: Nominal operating voltage, kV. CIM: BaseVoltage.nominalVoltage.

zone.description: Operating zone or region identifier used by the utility.

substationId.description: Parent substation identifier per utility records.

feederCode.description: Feeder code per utility records. Relevant for FEEDER and DT resources.
